name: sftp-file-browser
description: SFTP File Browser - Mobile-Friendly Web App

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: node -e "require('child_process').spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev', '--prefix', 'backend'], {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true}); require('child_process').spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev', '--prefix', 'frontend'], {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
